jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Baidyanath
jsonLd.description:
Baidyanath has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Gurgaon office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Baidyanath:
Baidyanath is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Baidyanath!
